user_prompt: The Skorpius Dunerider requires a preparation
prayer:

Commune with the Omnissiah, verifying the Skorpius Dunerider's preparedness through diagnostic noosphere links.

As the autocannon awakens to operation, sanctify its breeches with incense of sacred promethium.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the autocannon, beseeching fluidic fury upon foes of the Omnissiah.
During operation, intone the Canticle of Continuous Fire, guiding shells through blessed ballistics.
Anoint the recoil dampeners of the autocannon amid thunderous operation.
Affirm the autocannon's sanctity as its operation purges the unclean in mechanical wrath.
